name: HextaAI landing page
prompt: Build a premium landing page for an AI coding platform called HextaAI. It is an advanced vibe coding platform similar to Codex, Lovable, Cursor Agent, and Cline. Use Plan Mode deeply. Create a real PLAN.md before coding. Include hero, product preview, Plan Mode section, code generation section, live preview section, feature grid, workflow, pricing or CTA, FAQ, final CTA, and footer. It must be premium, minimal, advanced, fast, intelligent, developer-focused, smooth, trustworthy, modern, high-converting, fully responsive, polished, and not a tiny demo. Generate multiple files one by one with mini code boxes, run real checks, show live preview, and fix errors if any.
